Name: MOD-Navigation-SideNav-Functional: Verify 'Minutes' link opens the Minutes application in a new browser tab
Precondition: User has valid System Admin credentials. Application is accessible at [MODERNIZED_APPLICATION_URL].
Objective: To verify clicking 'Minutes' in the new-style side navigation opens the Minutes application in a new browser tab and the original tab remains unchanged on the current page.

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Step: Enter login email in the 'Email' field

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Test Data: locator: role=button name="Sign in" | value: none
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: User is redirected to the BoardEffect Home page.

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Step: Navigate directly to the UI-Workroom workroom page

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Test Data: locator: role=button name="Side navigation" | value: none

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Step: Verify 'Minutes' link is visible in the side navigation with an external link icon indicator
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: 'Minutes' link is visible in the side navigation. An external link indicator icon (img element) is present after the 'Minutes' label indicating it opens outside the current tab.
A new browser tab opens. The browser now has 2 tabs open. The new tab navigates to https://minutes-orca01.diligentdatasystems.com/api/launch.

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Step: Verify the new tab URL points to the Minutes application
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: New tab URL is https://minutes-orca01.diligentdatasystems.com/api/launch or a redirect thereof. Minutes application is loading or loaded in the new tab.

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Step: Verify the original tab remains on the workroom page unchanged
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: Original tab URL is still /workrooms/5732. Workroom page content is unchanged — h1 heading 'UI-Workroom' is still visible. The original tab was not navigated away.

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Step: Close the Minutes browser tab and switch back to the original tab
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: Browser returns to a single open tab showing the workroom page at /workrooms/5732.

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Test Data: locator: role=button name="Open profile menu" | value: none
locator: role=link name="Sign Out" | value: none
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: User is logged out and redirected to the login page.
